legal_header_intro_p1: Projekt City is a private, independent project provided to you completely free of charge as part of itsmarian.dev. By downloading, you receive a compressed ZIP file which you can unzip and load directly into Minecraft - at your own risk.
legal_header_intro_p2: Please note that Projekt City is managed by itsmarian.dev. The legally required Imprint (Legal Notice) and central contact information can be found at itsmarian.dev/legal/imprint.
legal_header_intro_p3: By continuing, you confirm that you have read and agree to our Advertisement Terms, End-User Licence Agreement, Privacy Policy, Terms of Use, and Use Our World Policy. If you do not agree, please leave our website and refrain from using our services.
s1_1_p1: A clearly identifiable contact person responsible for questions and support must be specified. Contact information - such as an e-mail address, phone number, or contact form - must be available on your website or app.
s1_1_p2: For the safety of both parties, a complete imprint containing your name, address, and contact details in accordance with applicable legal requirements must be provided on your website or app. Where permitted, we will also display this information on the information page of our advertising container.
s1_2_1_li1: Availability: You are solely responsible for the availability and stability of your service. Projekt City assumes no liability for outages, hacker attacks, or any other technical issues affecting your website or app.
s1_2_1_li2: Linking: Any links placed within your advertisement must not collect visitor data - such as IP addresses or browser history - without explicit user consent. All links must appear reputable and trustworthy.
s1_2_1_li3: Third-party content: Projekt City accepts no liability for the content of advertiser-submitted materials. You are responsible for ensuring that your content complies with our guidelines and must review it regularly.
s1_2_2_li1: Own content: You may only submit content that you have created yourself or for which you have obtained explicit permission from the rights holder.
s1_2_2_li2: AI-generated content: Any content that has been created, expanded, reviewed, improved, or modified using artificial intelligence must be clearly labeled as such. This also applies to images used in advertising spaces.
s1_2_2_li3: Third-party content: If you submit content created by others, you must hold the necessary rights or permissions and be able to provide proof upon request.
s1_2_3a: Imprint: Your website or app must include a complete imprint so that our users know who to contact and how to reach you.
s1_2_3b: Terms and Conditions: Your website or app must provide clear and easily understandable terms and conditions for all users.
s1_2_3c: Privacy Policy: Your website or app must include a privacy policy that clearly explains when and how user data is collected, stored, and used.
s2_1_li1: Editing options: You may edit and update your ad at any time, provided all changes continue to comply with these terms.
s2_1_li2: Regular review: You are expected to review and update your ad regularly and to inform us promptly of any significant changes.
s2_2_li1: Completeness: All required information - including contact details and relevant specifications - must be included in the ad and kept up to date at all times.
s2_2_li2: Accuracy: All information provided in or used to promote your ad must be truthful and must not contain misleading or false claims.
s2_3_p: We provide a reporting function that allows users to flag advertisements for review. All reports will be assessed directly by us. If a violation of these terms is identified, the advertising contract will be terminated immediately and, where necessary, legal action may be taken.
s2_4_p: All advertisements must be easy to understand and clearly labeled as advertisements so that every user can identify them as such without difficulty.
s2_5_p: The following file formats are supported:
s2_6_p: Images and GIFs must have a minimum resolution of 1000 x 1000 pixels to ensure they display correctly on larger screens. Videos must have a minimum resolution of 1040 x 1040 pixels and a frame rate of at least 60 FPS. All images and videos must use a 1:1 aspect ratio in order to fit correctly within our advertising containers.
s2_7_li1: Independent deletion: You may request the removal of your ad at any time. It will be deleted at the end of the active contract period.
s2_7_li2: System-related deletion: If your ad content causes excessive load on our systems or noticeably slows down our site(s), we will ask you to optimize your files accordingly.
s2_8_p: Pricing information and contract terms will be communicated separately upon inquiry. All applicable fees must be agreed upon before an advertisement goes live.
s2_9_li1: Permitted links: You may include links in your advertisements, provided they lead to reputable destinations and comply with the requirements outlined in section 1.2.1.
s2_9_li2: Link maintenance: You are required to regularly verify that all links in your advertisements remain valid, functional, and trustworthy.
s2_10_li1: Advertisements for apps, websites, and services are permitted, provided they are legal and comply with these terms. Misleading calls to action - such as fake "Download Here" buttons or deceptive prompts - are strictly prohibited.
s2_10_li2: All newly submitted advertisements are reviewed for compliance with these guidelines before going live.
s2_11_li1: Your website or app must allow users to submit feedback and provide a straightforward way for them to contact you.
s2_11_li2: Feedback received should be used actively to improve your platform and the quality of your advertisements.
s2_12_1: Labeling requirement: Any advertisement content that has been fully or partially created, generated, expanded, revised, or enhanced using artificial intelligence tools - including but not limited to text, images, graphics, audio, or video - must be clearly and visibly labeled as AI-generated. This label must be immediately recognizable to every user without requiring additional interaction.
s2_12_2: Responsibility and accuracy: The use of AI-generated content does not reduce your responsibility as an advertiser. You remain fully accountable for the accuracy, legality, and appropriateness of all submitted content, regardless of how it was produced.
s2_12_3: Copyright and intellectual property: You are responsible for ensuring that any AI-generated content you submit does not infringe upon the intellectual property rights of third parties. This includes content generated from prompts that are based on or derived from copyrighted works.
s2_12_4: Prohibited AI content: The following types of AI-generated content are strictly prohibited in advertisements on Projekt City: deepfakes or synthetic media that misrepresent real individuals; content designed to deceive, manipulate, or mislead users; content that imitates the visual identity, branding, or style of Projekt City without explicit written permission; and automatically generated text that makes unverifiable or exaggerated claims.
s2_12_5: Quality and consistency: AI-generated content must meet the same quality requirements as manually created content as outlined in section 2.6. Low-quality, distorted, or visually inconsistent AI-generated images or videos that could negatively affect the user experience will not be accepted.
s2_12_6: Disclosure to Projekt City: Upon request, you must be able to disclose which AI tools or systems were used to generate or modify your advertisement content. Failure to provide this information may result in your ad being removed.
s2_12_7: Right to review and removal: Projekt City reserves the right to review, reject, or remove any AI-generated advertisement content at any time if it is found to violate these terms or if its origin or accuracy cannot be sufficiently verified. In such cases, the advertising contract may be terminated without prior notice.
s3_p: By submitting an advertisement to Projekt City, you automatically agree to and accept all terms outlined in this document. Continued use of our advertising services constitutes ongoing acceptance of these terms.
